headline: PDS (NSEI:PDSL) Stock Faces Mixed Analyst Target Changes After Investor Day
summary: The latest update on PDS keeps the model fair value anchored at ₹410.0, so the headline price target level is unchanged for now. Behind that steady figure, recent analyst research has focused on how revised price targets elsewhere in the sector reflect shifting views on valuation frameworks, including the role of discount rates and future P/E assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these target moves and the evolving narrative around PDS can help you track what the market is really...
